Hero.description: Passionate about building scalable systems, automating complex workflows with RPA, and turning ideas into high-impact digital experiences.

About.title: About Me
About.card1Desc: End-to-end scalable web system development. Specialist in the JavaScript/TypeScript ecosystem (React, Next.js, Node.js), creating everything from modern, optimized user interfaces to secure, high-performance RESTful APIs.
About.card2Desc: Strong experience in reducing operational tasks through intelligent automations. Development of corporate bots, web scraping with Python, and workflows with Power Platform and Copado, focusing on optimizing business time and resources.
